channel.title: Lake City Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Lake City Events

item.title: Food Truck: Max’s Burgers and Wings
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Hellbent Brewing Company, 13035 Lake City Way NE, Seattle, WA 98125

From Hellbent Brewing - Food Truck Calendar

Event details

item.title: Food Truck: Tacos and Beers
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Hellbent Brewing Company, 13035 Lake City Way NE, Seattle, WA 98125

From Hellbent Brewing - Food Truck Calendar

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: CRAFT-ernoon
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Elementary, middle school, and high school students: join our youth librarians for crafts this Spring Break!

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Food Truck: Llama Fusion
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Hellbent Brewing Company, 13035 Lake City Way NE, Seattle, WA 98125

From Hellbent Brewing - Food Truck Calendar

Event details

item.title: Bilingual Family Story Time / La Hora de Cuentos Familiares Bilingües
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.Event is in Spanish and English.-------------------------------------------------------Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español e inglés.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Lake City Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods will be holding office hours as part of their ‘Meeting Community Where They Are At’ Initiative.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Food Truck: Tat's Deli
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Hellbent Brewing Company, 13035 Lake City Way NE, Seattle, WA 98125

From Hellbent Brewing - Food Truck Calendar

Event details

item.title: Lake City Art Walk
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Lake City neighborhood, Seattle

Monthly art walk in the Lake City neighborhood

From Lake City Art Walk

Event details

item.title: 正念太极
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room / 会议室 / 會議室

欢迎参加太极拳课程。太极拳是一种温和、冲击力低的运动，有助于提升身体的平衡能力、柔韧性以及整体协调性。本次活动将以普通话进行。

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Food Truck: Buddah Bruddah
item.description:
Friday, April 17, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Hellbent Brewing Company, 13035 Lake City Way NE, Seattle, WA 98125

From Hellbent Brewing - Food Truck Calendar

Event details

item.title: Arabic Story Time / وقت القصص بالعربية
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, children from birth through elementary school and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.Event in English and Arabic.---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------في وقت القصص، يمكن للأطفال الذين تتراوح أعمارهم من حديثي الولادة وحتى سن الخامسة وعائلاتهم الاستمتاع بالقصص والأغاني وأنشطة التعلُّم المرحة.نرحب بالعائلات من جميع الأعمار.يُعقد الحدث باللغة الإنجليزية والعربية

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Lake City Branch

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Adult Arts & Crafts: Gentle Expressions
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a series that combines creative expression with guided reflection to support wellness, self-discovery, and community connection.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Lake City Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. We usually have Spanish speaking tutors available Thursdays 6-7:30pm.

From SPL - Lake City Branch

Event details

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

item.title: Lake City Farmers Market
item.description:
Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: NE 125th St & 28th Ave NE, Seattle

Seasonal Thursday afternoon farmers market in Lake City. Runs June through September.

From Lake City Farmers Market
